shellCommands.command: /bin/bash -lc "sed -n '1,220p' package.json && printf '\\n--- app/page.tsx ---\\n' && sed -n '1,220p' app/page.tsx && printf '\\n--- app/layout.tsx ---\\n' && sed -n '1,220p' app/layout.tsx && printf '\\n--- next.config.ts ---\\n' && sed -n '1,160p' next.config.ts"
/bin/bash -lc 'mempal search "Next.js server component current server timestamp dynamic rendering unstable_noStore" --json --top-k 5'

/bin/bash -lc 'first=$(curl -fsS http://localhost:3000/ | sed -n '"'s/.*

\\(["'^<]*'"\\)<\\/p>.*/\\1/p'); second="'$(curl -fsS http://localhost:3000/ | sed -n '"'s/.*

\\(["'^<]*'"\\)<\\/p>.*/\\1/p'); printf 'first=%s\\nsecond=%s\\ndifferent=%s\\n' \""'$first" "$second" "$([ "$first" != "$second" ] && printf true || printf false)'
/bin/bash -lc "sed -n '1,220p' tsconfig.json && printf '\\n--- changed files ---\\n' && find app -maxdepth 2 -type f -print"
